# AutoMoney Store
> AI-powered digital products marketplace. Browse 342 digital downloads and 268 product pages across AI automation, digital marketing, freelancing, productivity, e-commerce, and design categories.

## Products
- [All Products](https://automoney-store.pages.dev/products/)
- [Digital Downloads](https://automoney-store.pages.dev/downloads/)

## Categories
- AI Automation: AI chatbot guides, prompt engineering, workflow automation
- Digital Marketing: Social media calendars, email funnels, SEO guides
- Freelancing: Proposal templates, contract bundles, invoicing
- Productivity: Notion dashboards, planners, goal-setting workbooks
- E-commerce: Shopify setup, dropshipping, affiliate marketing toolkits
- Design: Canva templates, logo packs, branding guides
- Crypto: Trading journals, NFT guides
